name: python -m pytest
description: Run pytest through the active Python interpreter or virtual environment

options.label: Keyword expression
options.description: Only run tests whose names match the expression

options.label: Marker expression
options.description: Only run tests matching the given marker expression

options.label: Exit on first failure
options.description: Stop after the first failing test

options.label: Last failed
options.description: Only rerun tests that failed in the last run

options.label: No capture
options.description: Show stdout and stderr directly during test execution

positionalArgs.label: Targets
positionalArgs.description: Files, folders, or node ids to test

examples.label: Run only tests matching a keyword
Run tests in a specific file and stop on first failure
